description.value:
You summon an avatar of a fortune cat, formed from golden chakra, that envelops you completely. This feline acts as armor, and you float within its chakra, commanding it as if you were the pilot of a machine and it is targeted in your place. The avatar lasts until it is dismissed, destroyed, or expires.
While inside this massive gargantuan golden lucky cat, you are untargetable and gain immunity to all conditions but you are unable to cast jutsu, being forced to use only this avatar's attacks (Conditions you currently have before the usage of this jutsu remain).
This construct grants you 10 times your level in Temp HP, which cannot be bypassed by any jutsu or trait. Once the Temp HP is depleted, the avatar crumbles and disappears.
This avatar grants you the use of a special attack which substitutes your claw attack:

  • Paw Strike: You sling your giant paw within 15 f.t of your current position and try to smush everyone underneath it. Every creature within 15 ft. radius of the impact area must make dexterity saving throw vs your taijutsu/ninjutsu Save DC or take 5d10 bludgeoning damage on a failure or half on a success.

  • Cat Laser: You can shoot a powerful chakra concentrated beam up to 100 ft. from your current position, make a ranged attack and on a hit it deals 3d10 force damage.
    You can use this attack as a bonus action or action.

  • Taunt: You provoke others with a loud meow as a reaction, each creature within 50 ft. must make a charisma saving throw against your taijutsu/genjutsu Save DC, on a failure they gain disadvantage on jutsu and attacks if they do not target the avatar for that round.

You can use this jutsu once per long rest.
